task_completion.description: The Markups module is open or line markups are visible in the scene.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Markups' module panel is visible on the left, or the mouse cursor is using the 'Create Line' tool, or line measurements are listed in a table.

task_completion.description: A line measurement is placed across the frontal horns of the lateral ventricles.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Axial (Red) view, a line spans the anterior, butterfly-shaped fluid-filled spaces (ventricles). The line connects the lateral-most tips of these horns.

task_completion.description: A line measurement is placed across the maximum internal diameter of the skull.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Axial (Red) view, a longer line spans the entire width of the brain/skull from inner table to inner table.

task_completion.description: Measurements are horizontal and on the same slice.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Both lines appear on the same 2D slice view simultaneously. Both lines are approximately horizontal (transverse orientation).

task_completion.description: Measurement values fall within physiologically plausible ranges.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Visible length values (in the Markups table or on the view) show the shorter line (frontal horn) between 20-60mm and the longer line (skull) between 100-180mm.

task_completion.description: Measurements are saved/exported or clearly presented for calculation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog shows the filename 'evans_measurements.mrk.json', or the file is visible in a file browser, or the final state shows the completed measurements ready for export.

integrity.description: Agent used the 3D Slicer GUI to place markups.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Slicer interface, mouse cursor, and interaction with the Markups module or toolbar, rather than a script running in a terminal.

integrity.description: Agent performed actual measurement rather than entering text values.
integrity.visual_evidence: The measurements appear as graphical lines in the viewer, not just text typed into a notepad or console.

integrity.description: The task was performed in 3D Slicer.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window is clearly 3D Slicer (distinctive 4-pane layout or UI theme).

privileged_info_for_vlm: Valid physiological ranges for adult brain MRI: Maximum frontal horn width is 20-60 mm. Maximum internal skull diameter is 100-180 mm. The Evans Index (ratio of horn/skull) is typically 0.15-0.50. Values >0.30 indicate possible hydrocephalus.
